graph_routes.title: Graph Area
graph_routes.reason: Visual proof for current macro state.

geoscen_rbl.rbl_text: GeoScen Tier 1 is operating in a Balanced / Monitoring Tier 1 Regime with cool macro temperature. C_FLOW v5 reads as Balanced Capital Flow, with fund-flow pressure at 0.56, indicating that capital-flow pressure is now active rather than placeholder-driven. Equity participation remains anchored by Healthy Breadth / Risk-On Participation with breadth factor score at 0.81. Rates pressure is classified as Low-Conviction / Monitoring Regime, while FX stress is classified as Low-Conviction / Monitoring Regime. WTI is classified as WTI Operational Commodity Monitoring, which should be read as commodity-pressure context feeding the capital-flow channel. ISM / PMI context is split between manufacturing (Weakening Manufacturing Regime | strongest: Textile Mills, Nonmetallic Mineral Products, Miscellaneous Manufacturing, Fabricated Metal Products, Plastics & Rubber Products | weakest: Petroleum & Coal Products, Food, Beverage & Tobacco Products, Primary Metals, Chemical Products, Computer & Electronic Products) & services (Strong Services Expansion | strongest: Real Estate, Rental & Leasing, Health Care & Social Assistance, Mining, Other Services, Utilities | weakest: Agriculture, Forestry, Fishing & Hunting, Transportation & Warehousing, Finance & Insurance, Accommodation & Food Services, Management of Companies & Support Services), supporting the qualitative RBL layer. Central bank tone is classified as Federal Reserve: Hawkish Policy Tone, elevated uncertainty, with policy divergence flagged (hawkish=70, dovish=13, uncertainty=43)., adding policy-language context to the OC interpretation layer. Overall, the regime reads as deployable & monitored rather than unresolved: the infrastructure is clean, while the narrative layer should continue expanding toward richer CB and PMI qualitative evidence.

signals.ism_manufacturing_state: Weakening Manufacturing Regime | strongest: Textile Mills, Nonmetallic Mineral Products, Miscellaneous Manufacturing, Fabricated Metal Products, Plastics & Rubber Products | weakest: Petroleum & Coal Products, Food, Beverage & Tobacco Products, Primary Metals, Chemical Products, Computer & Electronic Products
signals.ism_services_state: Strong Services Expansion | strongest: Real Estate, Rental & Leasing, Health Care & Social Assistance, Mining, Other Services, Utilities | weakest: Agriculture, Forestry, Fishing & Hunting, Transportation & Warehousing, Finance & Insurance, Accommodation & Food Services, Management of Companies & Support Services
signals.cb_tone_state: Federal Reserve: Hawkish Policy Tone, elevated uncertainty, with policy divergence flagged (hawkish=70, dovish=13, uncertainty=43).
signals.rates_rbl: Rates: Yield curve & policy signals indicate low-conviction / balanced. Overall: No decisive shift in rate regime; consistent with monitoring conditions.
signals.fx_rbl: FX: Currency conditions are mixed / range-bound, driven by central-bank divergence & macro pressure signals. Overall: No extreme dislocation; monitoring regime.
signals.wti_rbl: WTI panel is operational with price context as of 2026-04-27 & inventory context as of 2026-04-24.
